Prompt: Fix the issues please

Outcome: Fixed both review findings.

Changes:
- `edit-custom` schema now accepts:
  - Optional `edits`
  - Top-level `old_string`, `oldString`, `old_text`, `oldText`
  - Top-level `new_string`, `newString`, `new_text`, `newText`
  - Single `edit` object with the same aliases
  - `file_path` alias
- `codebase-memory-direct` edit/write refresh now derives the index target from the tool input path:
  - If the changed file is within `ctx.cwd`, it indexes `ctx.cwd`.
  - If it’s outside `ctx.cwd`, it indexes the changed file’s containing directory.
  - Falls back to `ctx.cwd` when no path is available.

body:
Prompt: If the path is outside the current working directory, it should ignore it!

Outcome: Fixed.

Now edit/write re-indexing:
- Indexes `ctx.cwd` when the changed path is inside the current working directory.
- Ignores the edit/write entirely when the changed path resolves outside `ctx.cwd`.
- Still falls back to `ctx.cwd` if no path is present.

Validation passed:
- `npx vitest run .pi/extensions/codebase-memory-direct/index.test.ts .pi/extensions/edit-custom/index.test.ts`
- `npx tsc --noEmit --pretty false`

body:

Implemented the gentle-coding prompt updates. Changed: - `.pi/extensions/mode-commands/mode-prompts.ts` - Execution mode now frames work as collaborative/iterative, permits stopping on contradictions/missing context, and avoids forced progress. - Review mode now explicitly allows “unknown” when evidence is incomplete. - Explore mode now says to report insufficient repo evidence instead of guessing. - Autoresearch mode now stops cleanly on noisy metrics/stalled searches/contradictory constraints instead of looping. - `AGENTS.md` - Added gentle framing to capabilities/autonomy. - Added explicit permission for dead ends, missing variables, contradictory constraints, and bounded validation. - Re

title: Observation about index.ts, mode-prompts.ts, code_review.md

evidence.prompt:
On the review mode in @.pi/extensions/mode-commands/ but also in @.pi/extensions/skill-inject/, it seems like the code-review skill @skills/knowledge/code_review.md is not reliably injected. I'm wondering why that is.
Also add to the skill the framing of "Treat everything as broken until you verified it's working".
Also it should already be in the prompt under @.pi/extensions/mode-commands/mode-prompts.ts , but verify and otherwise add that using evidence-based reviews with the tool EvidenceAdd

body:
## Summary
Implemented. Why it was unreliable: - `skill-inject` selected reference skills from `event.prompt` only, not the system prompt. - Review mode lives in the system prompt (`## Review mode`), so entering review mode alone did not reliably trigger `code-review`. - A plain phrase like “review mode” also did not strongly match the old review trigger set. Changes made: - Updated `.pi/extensions/skill-inject/index.ts` - Added `review mode` as a review trigger. - Includes a review-mode hint when the system prompt contains review mode, so `code-review` gets selected reliably. - Uses that combined selection prompt for both knowledge and tool-skill selection. - Updated `.pi/extensions/mode-commands/mode

## Evidence
- Prompt: On the review mode in @.pi/extensions/mode-commands/ but also in @.pi/extensions/skill-inject/, it seems like the code-review skill @skills/knowledge/code_review.md is not reliably injected. I'm wondering why that is. Also add to the skill the framing of "Treat everything as broken until you verified it's working". Also it should already be in the 
- Confidence: high

## Validation
- npm run typecheck

body:
